steps.title: Keep modifier attached
steps.content: The phrase "including the Nauruan and Marshallese" directly modifies "languages." A noun should not be separated from that essential modifier by punctuation.

steps.title: Avoid unnecessary punctuation
steps.content: A creates an unmatched dash, B inserts a colon where the sentence has not reached a complete stopping point, and D separates the noun from its modifier with an unnecessary comma. The answer is C.
